changes: v30: Fix WebGPU canvas capture — detect WebGPU canvases via data-engine attr, skip toDataURL (always blank for WebGPU), use viewport screenshot fallback directly
v30: Dark background fallback for full-viewport canvas sites — sample WebGL pixel color, fallback to #1a1a2e instead of white for WebGPU/3D sites
v30: Relaxed viewport screenshot fallback condition — allow for WebGPU canvases even with multiple canvas elements

v29: Fix canvas→image replacement — canvas-0.png was captured (515KB) but never referenced in HTML. Added post-processing pass that replaces remaining <canvas> tags with their captured PNG screenshots
Added canvas→image replacement to clean context recovery path
Enhanced body background capture to check html element and canvas parent chain for WebGL/3D sites (prevents white backgrounds)

v28: Ghost button fix for WebGL/3D sites — when buttons are hidden in display:none ancestors blocked by canvas/content guard, clone them as zero-size accessible elements on body so interaction scorer sees them as clickable (offsetParent !== null)
Added same button unhide logic to clean context recovery path (used by WebGL/3D sites that produce blank initial captures)
